final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat official account article cover for a fragrance new product launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a premium high-end aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with title prominently featured
Subject: must include the fragrance product as focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn-inspired atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (main title), "秋意染染 时光留香" (subtitle)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio
Avoid:
